patch.value: pm-changelog generator silently drops items the bundled @unbrained/pm-cli SDK cannot read

Discovered while verifying pm-changelog after the pm-iqgj TOON read fix. The pm-changelog extension reads items via listAllFrontMatter imported from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk, which correctly delegates to pm core parseItemDocument (now fixed by pm-iqgj). HOWEVER, the installed extension resolves that import to its OWN bundled node_modules/@unbrained/pm-cli (the package lists @unbrained/pm-cli in BOTH dependencies and peerDependencies, so npm installs a local copy that shadows the host). That bundled SDK is a published pm-cli version WITHOUT the read fix, so it still throws on bracketed-token-then-colon item files and silently skips them. Net effect: closed item total is 798 but the generator processes exactly 782 (798 minus the 16 pm-iqgj-recovered files). Normal items are unaffected. pm-changelog has NO code bug; its delegation is correct. Root cause is fixed in pm-cli core/SDK by pm-iqgj; full propagation requires (a) a pm-cli release containing the fix and (b) pm-changelog rebuilding against it. Durable hardening option to evaluate in the pm-changelog repo: drop @unbrained/pm-cli from dependencies (keep it as peerDependency + devDependency) so the extension uses the HOST SDK instead of a shadowing bundled copy - but this must be verified against the extension loader module resolution (related closed work: pm-1etl, pm-qfuq) before changing, since the host pm-cli may not be node-resolvable from the extension directory.

pm-changelog generator includes all closed items readable by the current pm core (item_count equals total closed count); the bundled-SDK shadowing is either eliminated (host SDK used) or documented as release-gated; no regression to changelog:pm:check.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Evidence: total closed=798, generator item_count=782, delta=16 = exactly the pm-iqgj-recovered files (pm-3akm/ss8d/1r6p... none present in CHANGELOG.pm.md while normal closed items pm-qsk8/c98b/xh0y/dpzc are). Extension dir has node_modules/@unbrained/pm-cli (bundled). Root-cause fix shipped in this PR via pm-iqgj (src/core/item/toon-decode.ts + parseToonItemDocument); this issue tracks propagation/hardening only and is blocked_by pm-iqgj.

value.author: package-changelog-lane
value.text: Package/changelog lane evidence 2026-05-24: npm latest pm-changelog is 2026.5.24-6 and the repo-installed project extension is also 2026.5.24-6; package doctor is clean and contracts expose changelog generate. However the installed package still has node_modules/@unbrained/pm-cli@2026.5.18, so pm-changelog-through-extension is still shadowing the host SDK: node dist/cli.js changelog generate --stdout produced item_count=785, while direct package CLI/current pm list-all --status closed saw itemCount=802/closed=802. CHANGELOG.pm.md is stale against the latest package/current tracker (--check returns changed=true). This remains propagation/hardening work: either publish pm-cli with the recovered item reader and rebuild/install pm-changelog against it, or change the upstream pm-changelog dependency model/loader contract so it uses the host SDK without breaking clean npm installs.

value.author: codex-changelog-verify
value.text: Evidence: upgraded project package with pm install npm:pm-changelog --project. Installed pm-changelog is 2026.5.24-8, package doctor is ok, bundled @unbrained/pm-cli SDK is 2026.5.24, and pm-changelog item_count now equals pm list-all --status closed count (804). Remaining issue found: clickable pm item references cannot be produced through the pm extension command because --item-url-base is package CLI-only and absent from pm contracts/extension handler; --include-links only uses item.url and current pm items do not expose URLs.

value.author: codex-changelog-verify
value.text: Evidence: latest npm pm-changelog is 2026.5.24-9 after upstream issue #7 fix/release. Installed in pm-cli via pm install npm:pm-changelog --project. Contracts now expose --item-url-base; package doctor/checks are clean; generated main CHANGELOG.md includes 804 closed pm items and clickable .toon links. Compared old manual CHANGELOG.md headings/content with generated output: generated output is broader (804 tracker items, 118665 bytes vs old 82799 bytes) and preserves release-tagged sections while grouping untagged tracker history under Unreleased/vnext/archive; this reflects pm item history rather than hand-written release prose.

value.author: codex-changelog-verify
value.text: Verification: pnpm changelog:pm:check passed; focused release automation/readiness tests passed (40 tests); static release slice passed (version, changelog check, security scan, static quality, npm pack); run-gates passed with build, typecheck, docs-skills, static, full coverage 1620 tests, version, secret scan, npx smoke, npm pack, compatibility; package-first dogfood and sentry/telemetry were intentionally skipped in that driver invocation.

patch.value: Installed and validated pm-changelog 2026.5.24-9, fixed upstream extension URL-base support in pm-changelog#7, switched pm-cli main CHANGELOG.md to package-owned generation with clickable item links, removed the obsolete sidecar/custom promotion path, and verified release gates.

value.author: codex-changelog-ci
value.text: Review response: accepted Gemini release-safety findings. generate-release-notes now matches plain dated pm-changelog headings with startsWith, release pipeline passes --release-version targetVersion to pm-changelog, and pipeline now fails if generated CHANGELOG.md lacks a non-empty target-version section. Rejected CodeRabbit pinning suggestion because this task explicitly requires latest available pm-changelog; install remains package-managed via pm install.
